title: Reignited & Refrozen
description: A modern refresh of the textures in the 'Ice and Fire' mod
body:
All things considered, Ice and Fire is an excellent mod! It adds several unique mobs from different lengths of mythology, and has remained relevant and available on later versions. However, the art of this mod is still a relic of its time, and not quite up to the standards you would expect from post-1.14 Minecraft. Thats where I come in!

This texture pack will continue to be updated as I work through the mod and its content, until eventually its all caught up. 

I have no personal connection with the developers of [Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons), credits to this mod and its ideas & content go to them!

If you experience any issues with the resource pack, [feel free to DM me](https://bsky.app/profile/thegayestvivian.bsky.social)
